# docs(benefits): ArchitectureOverview.md — name the main areas (cloud vs local) + local↔cloud spine + unified-Chroma + inventory freshness

Part of #14310 · follow the content rubric pinned on #14310. Refs #14310.

**Problem:** `ArchitectureOverview.md` has no LOCAL-vs-CLOUD distinction, draws **two ChromaDBs** (we run one unified), lists "Five MCP Servers" + Gemini-only embeddings (stale), and never maps the main areas a reader should explore.

**Acceptance Criteria**
- [ ] Opens by **naming the main areas** (Body · Brain · Neural Link · cloud-vs-local Agent OS) as a map readers navigate from.
- [ ] Adds the **LOCAL-vs-CLOUD Brain** section (two topologies of one organism) + the **local-vs-remote model** note.
- [ ] Persistence diagram = ONE unified Chroma (logical KB+MC collections); MCP-server table + structural inventory current (5+ servers incl. self-healing daemons; local/remote providers).

**Files:** `learn/benefits/ArchitectureOverview.md`.
